invalid-frame: Slope is too high for roofing material.
craftinginfo-guide-text:
VS Roofing Mod: Crafting Guide
Roofs are crafted in world by first constructing the frame and then adding roofing material(s) to it.

Frames
Frame Types

Stick / Bamboo / Branch
These early game frames are constructed from sticks, bamboo stakes and firewood(branch)stick|bamboostakes|firewood while holding twine/rope resources (Flax fibers, Cattails, Papyrus and Wildvines) flaxfibers|cattailtops|papyrustops/wildvine-section-north in your off hand.
Timber
This late(er) game frame is constructed from boards plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged while holding a hammer hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel in your off hand.
Metal
This late game frame is constructed from metal rods rod-copper|rod-tinbronze|rod-bismuthbronze|rod-blackbronze|rod-gold|rod-silver|rod-iron|rod-meteoriciron|rod-steel|rod-cupronickel|rod-electrum while holding a hammer hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel in your off hand.

Construct the frame with rightmouse button. You can also select the frame type (Standard, Eave, Ridge) by pressing the toolmodeselect (ToolModes) key.
Frames can be placed horizontally and vertically to create low and high slopes. Corners (outer and inner) are created by combinations of perpendicular roofs placed in front or behind each other.

Materials
To add roofing materials, hold the required item/block and press the rightmouse button while holding shift on the frame.
Some materials may require a tool in the off hand to be added.
Some roofing recipes may also require additional resources in your inventory. See Recipe Guide for more info.

Base block
To add the base(fill) block hold the desired block and press the rightmouse button while holding ctrl. These base blocks can be chiseled.
craftinginfo-recipes-text:
VS Roofing Mod: Recipes
Build steps for each roof type are outlined below in order. Some steps require mulitple materials*.
Note: These materials are required in addition to the frame!
Basic Stick
- 2 x sticks stick Note: Won't insulate (room). Stick
- 2 x sticks stick - 2 x sticks stick Branch
- 2 x firewood firewood Thatch
- 4 x dry grass or thatch drygrass|thatch Note: Supports slopes 1x1, 2x1, 3x1 and 1x2. Aged Thatch
- 4 x dry grass or thatch drygrass|thatch - 1 x clay clay-blue|clay-red|clay-fire Note: Supports slopes 1x1, 2x1, 3x1 and 1x2. Cloth
- 1 x leather or cloth leather-sturdy-plain|leather-normal-plain|cloth-plain|cloth-mordant|cloth-blue|cloth-red|cloth-yellow|cloth-green|cloth-purple|cloth-pink|cloth-orange|cloth-brown|cloth-gray|cloth-black|cloth-white Bamboo
- 2 x bundle of bamboo stakes bamboostakes Clay Shingle
- 1 x fired clay shingle shingle-burned-black|shingle-burned-brown|shingle-burned-cream|shingle-burned-fire|shingle-burned-gray|shingle-burned-orange|shingle-burned-red|shingle-burned-tan. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Glass
- 1 x glass block/slab glass-quartz|glass-plain|glass-green|glass-blue|glass-violet|glass-red|glass-yellow|glass-brown|glass-vintage|glass-smoky|glass-pink|glassslab-quartz-north-free|glassslab-plain-north-free|glassslab-green-north-free|glassslab-blue-north-free|glassslab-violet-north-free|glassslab-red-north-free|glassslab-yellow-north-free|glassslab-brown-north-free|glassslab-vintage-north-free|glassslab-smoky-north-free|glassslab-pink-north-free. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Slate
- 3 x slate stone stone-slate + 1 x clay clay-blue|clay-red|clay-fire. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Copper
- 1 x copper plate metalplate-copper. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Wood Slab
- 1 x log log-placed-birch-ud|log-placed-oak-ud|log-placed-maple-ud|log-placed-pine-ud. Wood Basic
- 1 x board plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Wood
- 1 x board plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel - 1 x board plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Wood + Clay Shingle
- 1 x board plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel - 1 x fired clay shingle shingle-burned-black|shingle-burned-brown|shingle-burned-cream|shingle-burned-fire|shingle-burned-gray|shingle-burned-orange|shingle-burned-red|shingle-burned-tan. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel Sod
- 1 x board plank-birch|plank-oak|plank-maple|plank-pine|plank-acacia|plank-kapok|plank-baldcypress|plank-larch|plank-redwood|plank-ebony|plank-walnut|plank-purpleheart|plank-aged. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel - 1 x medium fertility soil soil-medium-none|soil-medium-verysparse|soil-medium-sparse|soil-medium-normal - 1 x dry grass drygrass Note: Supports slopes 1x1, 2x1 and 3x1. Sod (Slab)
- 1 x log log-placed-birch-ud|log-placed-oak-ud|log-placed-maple-ud|log-placed-pine-ud. - 1 x medium fertility soil soil-medium-none|soil-medium-verysparse|soil-medium-sparse|soil-medium-normal - 1 x dry grass drygrass Note: Supports slopes 1x1, 2x1 and 3x1. Metal
- 1 x metal plate or nails and strips metalplate-iron|metalnailsandstrips-iron. Off hand: hammer-copper|hammer-tinbronze|hammer-bismuthbronze|hammer-blackbronze|hammer-gold|hammer-silver|hammer-iron|hammer-meteoriciron|hammer-steel * Where multiple materials are required, the first material specified is the primary material and needs to be held (in the active hot bar slot)
